name.ja: <ruby>速<rt>そく</rt></ruby><ruby>撮<rt>さつ</rt></ruby>マシン<ruby>Ｅ<rt>イー</rt></ruby><ruby>Ｎ<rt>エヌ</rt></ruby><ruby>Ｇ<rt>ジー</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: Declare 1 card type (Monster, Spell, or Trap).

effect.en: Your opponent excavates the top card of their Deck. If it was the declared card type, you can add 1 EARTH Attribute Machine Type monster from your Graveyard to your hand. If you added a card by this effect, you cannot activate the effect of "High-Speed Machine ENG" this turn. Your opponent places the excavated card on the top of their Deck.
